checks.name: State Independence
checks.notes: Skill is fully stateless. Context preserved through physical artifacts (CODEBASE_INVENTORY.md, ENTITY_INDEX.md, KNOWLEDGE_GRAPH.json, GRAPH_AUDIT_REPORT.md, KNOWLEDGE_GRAPH.html).

checks.name: Artifact Gating
checks.notes: Every transition requires the preceding artifact. Sequential gating from SCOUT through VISUALIZE.

checks.name: Intent Preservation
checks.notes: Mandatory 'context' in CODEBASE_INVENTORY.md and GRAPH_AUDIT_REPORT.md. 'tradeoffs_rejected' in ENTITY_INDEX.md.

checks.name: Loop Breakers
checks.notes: max_retries: 3 and max_depth: 10 in YAML frontmatter. Wait-For-Human fallback for ambiguous classification.

checks.name: Physical Execution Standards
checks.notes: CRITIC cross-references inventory against graph for completeness verification. No subjective approval.

checks.name: Single-File Format
checks.notes: YAML frontmatter combined with Markdown body in SKILL.md.

checks.name: Composite Personas
checks.notes: Clearly defined: Cartographer (Scout), Taxonomist (Index), Architect (Build), Inspector (Audit), Illustrator (Visualize), Senior Auditor (Critic).

checks.name: Graceful Degradation
checks.notes: Read-only tool requirements. HITL fallback for ambiguous cases. Depth limits prevent resource exhaustion.

checks.name: Separation of Concerns
checks.notes: YAML handles routing logic; Markdown handles cognitive instructions.

checks.name: Agent Agnosticism
checks.notes: No reliance on specific LLM features. Uses only filesystem tools.
